{{Infobox character
| name = Shadeseeker
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Uncrowned
| abilities = madra mixing aspects of swords, water, and blood
| affiliations = Tidewalkers
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Shadeseeker is a sacred shark and a member of the [[Tidewalker sect]], holding the title of [[Uncrowned]]. She possesses advanced shapeshifting abilities that allow her to take on a nearly human appearance, though she retains shark-like features such as serrated teeth and a fin on her shoulder. In combat, she utilizes daggers composed of [[madra]] that blend elements of water, blood, and swords to create jagged, black-water fangs. She is the daughter of the leader of the [[Tidewalkers]].}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Shadeseeker is a shark-girl who holds the title of [[Uncrowned]] of the [[Tidewalkers]]. As the daughter of a [[Herald]], she utilizes a unique [[madra]] that blends elements of water, blood, and swords. In combat, she wields a pair of jagged daggers to engage her enemies. Despite her capabilities, she ultimately fell victim to the schemes orchestrated by Reigan.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Shadeseeker]] is the [[Uncrowned]] of the [[Tidewalkers]] and a shark-girl.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Shadeseeker]]'s father is a [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Shadeseeker]] fights with a pair of jagged daggers.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Shadeseeker]]'s [[madra]] mixes aspects of swords, water, and blood.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Shadeseeker]] was defeated by Reigan's plans.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Tidewalkers]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
